headline: Evaluating Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Valuation After New Healthcare And Supply Chain AI Initiatives
summary: Why Zebra’s new healthcare and supply chain moves matter for investors Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) is in focus after partnering with Aiva Health on hands-free, voice AI tools for nurses and showcasing new rugged wearables and AI software for supply chains at MODEX 2026. See our latest analysis for Zebra Technologies. The recent AI healthcare partnership and MODEX 2026 product showcases have arrived during a period where Zebra’s 30-day share price return of 16.54% contrasts with a weaker year to...
